description: An advanced text counter that allows you to accurately count the number of kanji, hiragana, katakana, and total characters in a piece of text. The interface is modern and optimized for mobile devices.
category: formatter encoder generator tester converter japanese text number color image network crypto
features: show error message inline when input is invalid Japanese text
live/reactive feature for real-time updates of the character counts
precision in counting individual kanji, hiragana, and katakana
option to export character counts in various formats (CSV, JSON)
